_comment: corroborate → judge → assert DAG fragment. Splice into a lit-review loop after synthesis. Zero new walker/dispatch mechanism — reuses the existing agent node + rv dag brief dispatch.
_usage: Add these nodes after your synthesis node. Update spec: pointers to your task file and reads: paths to your project artifacts.
_framing: D4: rank narrows, judge confirms, human reviews — NEVER assert from rank alone.
The corroborate node produces a candidates JSON (rv research corroborate --emit).
The judge-corroboration node reads that JSON and assesses each candidate for GENUINE corroboration.
Rejected candidates are dropped WITH a recorded reason (anti-false-positive).
The assert node writes a findings note carrying corroborated_by: frontmatter for accepted candidates.

nodes.label: Cross-project corroboration — rank candidates from declared peer projects
_spec_guidance: Run: rv research corroborate "<claim>" --from <your-project> --emit state/corroboration-candidates.json
If no declared peers: the hub should declare edges first via rv project relate.
Requires: rv project relate <from> <peer> --kind <why> already run by hub.
Output: state/corroboration-candidates.json (claim + ranked candidates + provenance).

nodes.label: Judge corroboration candidates — accept/reject each with reasoning
_spec_guidance: Read the candidates JSON from reads:.
For each candidate: assess whether it GENUINELY corroborates the claim in the context of your findings.
Criteria: same construct, compatible operationalization, no confound that invalidates the comparison.
Output: accept (with reason) or reject (with reason) for each candidate.
Produce a judgment report: findings/corroboration-judgment.md listing accepted + rejected candidates.
ANTI-PATTERN: do NOT accept every candidate — the ranker narrows, you confirm.
ANTI-PATTERN: do NOT reject without a recorded reason — surface the rejection rationale.

nodes.label: Human review gate — corroboration judgment quality (crew-cannot-self-approve)
nodes._framing: The human reviews the judge's verdict, not each individual edge declaration.

nodes.label: Assert corroboration — write findings note with corroborated_by: frontmatter
_spec_guidance: Read the judgment report from reads:.
For each ACCEPTED candidate: write or update the findings note carrying:
corroborated_by:
- provenance: @<peer-slug>:<note-rel>:<anchor>
kind: <edge-kind>
reason: <judge-accepted-reason>
For each REJECTED candidate: record the rejection reason in the findings note as:
rejected_corroboration:
- provenance: @<peer-slug>:<note-rel>:<anchor>
reason: <judge-rejection-reason>
ANTI-PATTERN: do NOT assert from rank alone — only accepted candidates from the judge.
OKF type: findings. Validate with note.OKF_TYPES.
